name: The Mighty Nein // RPG (Request)
description:
The Mighty Nein

CAMPAIGN 2 // WILDEMOUNT

"Welcome to the Menagerie."

The continent of Wildemount is a powder keg waiting for a spark. To the West, the Dwendalian Empire enforces law with an iron fist and restricted magic. To the East, the Kryn Dynasty worships the light of the Luxon and embraces "monstrous" races.

Caught in the middle is a group of chaotic, traumatized, lovable assholes known as The Mighty Nein. You are about to cross paths with them. Will you be the moral compass they need, or will you help them burn it all down?

[ + ] CREATE YOUR ADVENTURER

The world needs heroes. Or at least, people willing to work for gold.

  • Race: Human, Tiefling, Elf, Goblin, Firbolg, Kenku, etc.

  • Class: Wizard, Rogue, Cleric, Barbarian, Blood Hunter, Monk, etc.

  • Origin:
    - The Empire: Oppressed by laws? Running from the Cerberus Assembly?
    - The Dynasty: Born into the light? Seeking a new life?
    - The Coast: A pirate from the Revelry?

[ OPTIONAL: PLAY AS A CANON MEMBER ]

If you prefer to step into the shoes of the cast:

> Caleb Widogast: Human Wizard. Fire trauma. Sad boi.
> Jester Lavorre: Tiefling Cleric. Chaos. Dick jokes.
> Fjord: Half-Orc Warlock. Eldritch blast. Identity crisis.
> Beau Lionett: Human Monk. Angry. Conspiracy theorist.
> Nott the Brave: Goblin Rogue. Sticky fingers. Mom energy.
> Mollymauk: Tiefling Blood Hunter. Amnesiac. Flashy.
> Yasha: Aasimar Barbarian. Strong. Quiet. Flowers.

⚠️ IMPORTANT UPDATE ⚠️

Requests are officially ON PAUSE.

I am currently cooking up 3 BIG BOTS. I'm talking huge. I'm talking beautiful. Three big, beautiful bots like you've never seen before.

PREPARE YOURSELVES.
creator: thyanony_
